docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED AUG-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALMALEH, NADIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIAS, JOLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALMALEH, NADIA $628.17 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $658.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $628.17 FILED BY ARIAS, JOLENE AS TO DEFENDANT ALMALEH, NADIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALMALEH, NADIA
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ARIAS, JOLENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
